name: AI Stock Photo Website
summary: Professional stock photo website featuring AI-generated images with automated content generation, NSFW filtering, and comprehensive management
concept: Automated stock photography platform that generates trending images using AI, scrapes news for topics, validates content quality/safety, and provides a modern web interface with lazy loading
primary_features: Automated trending topic extraction from news feeds
Responsive web interface with lazy loading
secondary_features: Image quality validation using vision models
Automated database cleanup and thumbnail fixes

tech_stack.frontend: Bootstrap 5, Vanilla JS with Intersection Observer
tech_stack.automation: Bash scripts + Cron with comprehensive logging

external_services.ComfyUI: AI image generation service with turbo/ovis workflows
external_services.Ollama: Local LLM for text generation and vision analysis
external_services.BBC RSS: News feed for trending topics extraction
external_services.TimeAndDate: Holiday information scraping for seasonal content

key_files.auto_stock_creator.py: Main AI image generation script with NSFW filtering
key_files.scripts/cleanup_deleted.php: Cleanup deleted images and fix broken thumbnails
key_files.public/index.php: Homepage with recent images and categories
key_files.includes/config.php: Database configuration with file existence filtering

architecture.overview: Three-tier architecture with automated content generation, NSFW filtering, database management, and responsive web frontend with performance optimizations

content_generation.description: AI-powered image generation with trending topic extraction and NSFW filtering
content_generation.implementation: Python script using ComfyUI and Ollama APIs with vision-based content validation

content_filtering.description: Multi-layer content validation including NSFW detection and quality checks
content_filtering.implementation: Vision AI analysis for professional standards and safety

database_layer.description: SQLite database with automated indexing, cleanup, and file existence validation
database_layer.implementation: PHP scripts for CRUD operations, maintenance, and broken link prevention

web_frontend.description: Responsive Bootstrap-based interface with lazy loading and performance optimization
web_frontend.implementation: PHP pages with modern CSS/JS and Intersection Observer API

automation.description: Cron-based scheduling for generation, maintenance, and comprehensive logging
automation.implementation: Bash scripts with error handling and detailed logging

current_capabilities: Generate images based on trending news topics and holidays
Detect and filter NSFW content automatically
Validate image quality and professional standards
Provide responsive web gallery with lazy loading
Track download statistics and popular content
Prevent broken image links with file existence checks
Clean up deleted files from database

how_to_run_locally.setup: Run ./setup.sh to configure environment and dependencies
how_to_run_locally.requirements: PHP 7.4+, Python 3.8+, ComfyUI server, Ollama server with vision model

api_endpoints.description: Homepage with recent images and category grid (lazy loaded)
Category page showing all images in category (filtered for existence)
Individual image detail page with download
Search results for image queries (filtered for existence)

turbo.description: Fast generation mode using turbo workflow

ovis.description: High-quality generation with enhanced vision validation

completed: AI image generation with dual workflows
News topic extraction and holiday content
Image quality and professional standards validation
Database management with file existence checks

security_considerations: NSFW content detection and automatic rejection
Environment variable protection for API keys
File existence validation to prevent broken links
Input sanitization and SQL injection prevention
Proper error handling without information disclosure
progress_state: Production ready with comprehensive automation, content filtering, and performance optimization
